---
name: Workflow request
about: Request a new SkillLayer workflow
title: "[WORKFLOW REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What Task Should This Workflow Handle?

Describe the routine task you want SkillLayer to handle deterministically.

## Why Is This Needed?

What repetitive work does this save? Why doesn't an existing workflow already
cover it?

## Example Use Case

Give a concrete example: the task phrase you'd use, the kind of repo it
applies to, and the structured output you'd expect back.

## Related Workflows

List any existing SkillLayer workflows that come close but don't quite fit.
